nodes.name: model
nodes.class_name:
EfficientNet(
  (conv_stem): Conv2d(6, 48, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(2, 2), padding=(1, 1), bias=False)

  )

    (0): Sequential(

        (se): SqueezeExcite(

          24, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True

      (1): DepthwiseSeparableConv(

          24, eps=1e-05, momentum=0.1, affine=True, track_running_stats=True
          (drop): Identity()
          (act): Identity()
        )
        (drop_path): Identity()
      )
    )
    (1): Sequential(
